name: RateLimitConfig
description: Configuration for an API rate limit policy defining request quotas, time windows, and enforcement behavior.

id.description: Unique identifier for the rate limit configuration.

name.description: Human-readable name for this rate limit policy.

api_name.description: Name of the API this rate limit applies to.

scope.description: Scope at which the rate limit is applied.

limit.description: Maximum number of requests allowed in the defined time window.

window_seconds.description: Duration of the rate limit time window in seconds.

window_type.description: Algorithm used to enforce the rate limit window.

burst_limit.description: Maximum burst allowance above the baseline rate limit.

enabled.description: Whether this rate limit policy is currently active.

response_status.description: HTTP status code returned when the rate limit is exceeded.

headers.description: Rate limit headers returned in API responses.

limit_header.description: Header name for the rate limit maximum.

remaining_header.description: Header name for remaining requests in the window.

reset_header.description: Header name for the window reset timestamp.

retry_after_header.description: Header name indicating when the client may retry.
